reviews.title: Easy access to WSU and Moscow
reviews.text: A decent place, located right near the road to Moscow, easy access to WSU campus, has all you need for a quick and easy business stay in Pullman.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Rip off !!!! 800 a night?  Preying on people supporting WSU.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The value is never going to be the same. Since covid hit rates have doubled and very unlikely they'll go back.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The Staff and Pool were great!
reviews.negatives: The fire alarm went off every time we took a shower. The parking was AWFUL!

reviews.title: Convenient to WSU, great value
reviews.text:
We took our small dog to the WSU Veterinary Hospital.  This motel is located just minutes from the WSU campus.  We made several trips back and forth for 2 days.
The room was very good, the staff members were great.
Everyone was very supportive of our situation...we had to stay an extra day---discovered at the last minute.  The manager, room staff, and even the maintenance people were very helpful.  Gabby's surgery went well, so it was a good experience all around !!!

reviews.title: was not expecting to go back into the 70's, needs a major update
reviews.positives: not a thing
reviews.negatives: Very outdated

reviews.title: Good if you're in college and don't want peaceful uninterrupted sleep
reviews.text: I was charged twice and had to go back a few days after I checked out to question the double charge on my card. Majority of guests will be college kids who will scream, run, and laugh in the hallway especially on the weekends. Walls are thin so you will hear... nsfw sounds coming from the other room. Maybe I was unlucky. No elevator so if you have more than 1 heavy luggage or bags, you're on your own going back and forth on the stairs. Then again, this is probably the best place to stay temporarily in Pullman. I would stay again if I had to but can't recommend it to anyone who might be there for business.

reviews.title: A place to sleep
reviews.positives: There was not a fruit option when I went to breakfast
reviews.negatives: Shower drain wasn't working, room wasn't ready when I arrived after 5 pm...exactly when I noted I'd arrive, tiles were loose on bathroom floor, lumpy pillows and a mattress with a big dip in the middle, tv not hooked up

reviews.title: Manager
reviews.text: The manager was amazing and fixed an online order problem.

reviews.title: Disappointed reviews didn't point out any of the quality issues
reviews.positives: Location was good. Desk staff was friendly That's is it
reviews.negatives: Way overpriced ($600/night) for the accommodations.  The bed was creaky, frig rattled all night, coffee maker didn't work, mediocre comp breakfast, room was only partially cleaned once (3-night stay), they never did change the sheets. Room had one small sink.  Outdated TV.

reviews.title: Great place, great room, great price
reviews.text: Great place, great room, great price

reviews.title: We would my stay at a quality inn again.
reviews.positives: Bathroom was dirty, floors hadn’t been mopped. Walls are dirty and damaged.
reviews.negatives: Cleanliness

reviews.title: Always a great deal and great staff
reviews.text: I’ve stayed here multiple times and am always happy with the hotel.  The staff is always great.  The rooms are clean.  The WiFi works strong.  There is even a little breakfast for a great start to your day.

reviews.title: Hotel needs to be updated & cleaned properly.
reviews.positives:
The beds were comfortable. Breakfast was ok.
 Eggs were cold & hard
 Danishes or muffins would have been a nice addition.
.
reviews.negatives: Bathroom sink wasn't draining. Remote control for TV didn't turn it off or on. Black mold around window air conditioner. Jacuzzi was in horrible condition. The staff were not friendly.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very clean. Staff very good. Breakfast was good. I highly recommended it....value/$ is very good.

reviews.title: I would spend the extra $ and stay somewhere else
reviews.negatives: there was never any employee at the front desk.  Room smelled.  Breakfast sucked.  Couldn't get clean towels from the maids because they were all in the wash.

reviews.title: Very nice stay for the value!
reviews.text: Great clean place to stay. Will be back!!Good value

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The breakfast and check in and out were good.
reviews.negatives: The room was cringy, especially the bathroom. The tile floors were broken. The shower pressure was weak. And the drain would clog leading to me standing in stagnant water.

reviews.title: Exceeded Expectations
reviews.text: First time overnighting in Pullman. The staff was exceptional and I will definitely stay here again if we are in the area.

reviews.title: Worn Out Building
reviews.positives: The staff was fine but it’s such an old building and there’s no elevator.  It’s just very worn out and no upgrades but the price isn’t that much less than Marriott that’s new and nice with amenities.
reviews.negatives: See above

reviews.title: Confort
reviews.text: The bed was heavenly and the pillows very comfortable!

reviews.title: Amazing staff, amazing food, horrid bed.
reviews.positives: The staff at the counter were very nice! And the breakfast was AMAZING, honestly so so so good!
reviews.negatives: The bed in my room was honestly the worst hotel bed I have ever slept in. Incredibly stiff, with very thin pillows. It was a very not good experience.

reviews.title: Will definitely stay again
reviews.text: Check in was fast and efficient. They had fresh baked cookies offered in the lobby. The desk attendant was kind. The room is pretty typical and had very clean bedding, bath linens, and flooring. We enjoyed the breakfast which had fresh waffles, cereal, bagels, yogurt, and fruit. Our family will definitely stay here again while visiting our Coug!

reviews.title: Not worth the price!
reviews.positives: Not much
reviews.negatives: The price and staff was not helpful. Told us there were no Ubers in Pullman or Moscow and gave some card for a cab company. Totally trying to get us to use her hubbys cab!

reviews.title: Very comfortable and great staff.
reviews.text: We were traveling from Washington with our band, The Unknowns, and were warmly received by the staff.  They were very attentive to our needs with all our equipment and the room was very clean and comfortable.  We would definitely stay again.

reviews.title: Disappointing stay.
reviews.positives: Rooms are pretty clean. Location good.
reviews.negatives:
Our room was not serviced. We stayed Friday and Saturday nights. Returned sat night at 10:30 pm on Saturday after being  gone all day.When we got back, the room hadn't been serviced. Trash cans were full and dirty towels were where I left them Saturday morning.  No fresh towels were delivered.
Sunday morning there was a good sized mouse swimming in the pool. 
The parking lot is too small, also.

reviews.title: Very friendly and comfortable
reviews.text: We loved it here.  The staff was wonderful. Our band stayed here after a gig and it was a great place to stay. Would definitely recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Just stay some where else.
reviews.positives: Location and price
reviews.negatives: It was dirty and muggy and noisy and uncomfortable. I booked a room with 2 queen beds intentionally as I was traveling with my sister and my daughter. I planned on sharing a bad with my 7 year old daughter and my sister having her own bed. When we arrived it was late- I planned on carrying my daughter up and just putting her in bed. Only the room was dirty. It wasn’t cleaned at all. Trash on the floor, towels on the floor muggy and the beds were a mess. So I had to wake her and go back downstairs and tell the man at the desk (who was very kind and helpful and empathetic by the way). I was “upgraded to a suit” which has a pull out bed and one bed. The a/c was barley working and it also only cooled the back end of the room and only slightly. The pull out bed my sister slept on smelled like pee and was rock hard and she could hear people outside our door all night knocking on room doors. She was drenched in sweat from the heat and my daughter and eye were also warm despite the a/c because it wasn’t working. The morning staff didn’t want to make it right at all and sent us on our way.

reviews.title: Great Place to stay
reviews.text: Friendly staff. Big room, nice breakfast.

reviews.title: Decent place to stay, friendly front staff, no elevator
reviews.positives: Location was great easy access to WSU and University of Idaho.
reviews.negatives:
Housekeeping NEVER cleaned our room or brought us towels in the 3 night stay that we were there. We requested more towels and never received them. Was left a note on the door that due to low staffing they couldn’t clean our room or provide towels. 

Seen housekeeping staff multiple times sitting outside the door closest to their area smoking/vaping but too understaffed to bring us towels…

Pool needed to be cleaned my husband actually took the pool skimmer and cleaned it out himself so we could enjoy it along with others

reviews.title: 普通です
reviews.text: 標準的なホテルで可もなく不可もなくです

reviews.title: Staff was very nice and comfortable rooms
reviews.negatives:
A gas line had broke so no hot water couldn't take a shower
No discount was offered 
I would expect that even tho not their fault

reviews.title: Excellent Services
reviews.text: Very good location, close to airport and WSU. Free shuttle from to the airport and WSU. Very kind staffs and free breakfast.

reviews.title: Overall a
reviews.positives: Good location
reviews.negatives: Really run down. Staff were never at the desk, always had to be ing the bell for service.

reviews.title: Budget hotel wouldn’t pay the $400 price a night
reviews.positives: Beds were comfortable and closet to campus
reviews.negatives: Lacking in options of food availability for breakfast and hot tub seemed unclean.

reviews.title: It was close to the university and access to to routes that enabled us to continue our journey.
reviews.positives: Breakfast had variety of options.
reviews.negatives: Carpet needed vacuumed. Found dry cereal bits on carpet and in one of the complimentary paper cups. I'm 77 years old. Hauling several pieces of luggage up to 2nd floor was a challenge. No elevator available. If I stay again, I'll remember to request ground floor.

reviews.title: It was pleasant
reviews.positives: Close to my family
reviews.negatives: No elevator

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The room was clean and good sized
reviews.negatives: The hot tub wasn't very clean and needed to be repaired

reviews.title: I’d stay here again. However, I’d try for a more kept up place first.
reviews.positives: Location to WSU campus
reviews.negatives: Needs renovation.

reviews.title: It was ok for over night, I wouldn’t  stay longer.
reviews.positives: Easy to find
reviews.negatives: Missing a comfortable chair. TV was lacking channels to watch.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: This hotel was recommended by Pullman Hospital, partly on the basis that they offer a discount for people undergoing surgery at the hospital.  When I called and asked about a medically-discounted room, they said they were full.  When I went to booking.com, they had a room.  They are conveniently close, but I feel like they mislead the hospital on the discount.

reviews.title: Good enough for a short trip.
reviews.negatives: The furniture in the room was pretty banged up and doors on cabinets squeaked loudly when opened. The TV didn't work- wasn't hooked up to anything? The night staff tried to chase us out of the hot tub before the posted 11pm time.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: It was ok, breakfast was good too. The staff was very friendly.
reviews.negatives: 1st day key card wasn't working, but the staff was willing to help anytime we needed room door open. By the next morning, we got the key card.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The breakfast and staff were great and welcoming.
reviews.negatives: The hot tub was a hot mess. Needed some cleaning.
